Kompania Bello.description: Transnational Albanian-speaking cocaine trafficking network that organized shipments from South America to Europe and coordinated wholesale distribution across EU member states. It negotiated directly with South American cartels and used encrypted communications and informal value transfer systems. The network was dismantled in September 2020 following a five-year multi-country investigation codenamed Operation Los Blancos, resulting in over 100 arrests and seizures of nearly 4 tonnes of cocaine.

descriptions: Kompania Bello is listed as an ally of Los Choneros in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Clan del Golfo, Urías Rondón Front, Kompania Bello

descriptions: Kompania Bello is listed as an ally of Los Lobos.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Kompania Bello, FARC 48th Front, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Kompania Bello is listed as an ally of Los Tiguerones in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Chone Killers, Los Lobos, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Kompania Bello

descriptions: YDG-H was the youth wing of the PKK before being succeeded by YPS.
edges.evidence_quote: The Civil Protections Units (YPS) is the successor of the Patriotic Revolutionary Youth Movement (YDG-H), the youth wing of the PKK.

descriptions: YDG-H is a group (youth wing) of the PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: Patriotic Revolutionary Youth Movement (2006–2015)

descriptions: DLASTHR was in a turf war with the True Kings over drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 2010s, gun violence was thought to be part of the gang's turf war over drug supply with its rival gang, the True Kings.

descriptions: DLASTHR and True Kings were in conflict over drug supply, involving shootings and fire bombings.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, conflict between DLASTHR and a young breakaway group known as 'True Kings', resulted in Drive by shootings, fire bombings and intimidation, as tensions over drug supply erupted between the two gangs.

descriptions: DLASTHR and True Kings are sworn enemies in an ongoing feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Police allege the 'callous killing' was connected to an ongoing feud between rival Assyrian gangs, the True Kings and DLASTHR, a crime group that has long been regarded as a sworn enemy of Mr Kettule over the years.

descriptions: Saba Saba is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups include ChinaSquadNyalenda Base, Chief Squad, Nyamasaria Massive, Kenda Kenda, Kondele Baghdad for Peace, Karamojong Boys, Saba Saba, Artur Margaryan, Kebago, and American Marines.

descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

edges.evidence_quote: historians such as Brian J. Robb and Erin H. Turner traced the first organized crime syndicates to the Cochise Cowboy Gang and the Wild Bunch

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: GCP

'Ndrina Gallico.description: The Gallico are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Palmi, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in extortion, drug trafficking, and infiltration of public contracts. They are allied with the Morgante, Sgrò, and Sciglitano families and operate also in Rome. The group has been engaged in a long feud with the Parrello-Condello and Bruzzise clans.

descriptions: Bellocco and Gallico were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 2002 - Operazione Tallone d'Achille coordinata dalla DDA di Reggio Calabria contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli , Gallico accusate di associazione mafiosa, estorsione, armi.

descriptions: The Bruzzise joined the Parrello-Condello side in a feud against the Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello a cui si aggiungono anche i Bruzzise

descriptions: The feud between Gallico and Bruzzise reignited in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Questi ultimi anni, grazie all'operazione Cosa mia del 2010 fanno emergere una nuova esplosione della faida tra i Gallico e i Bruzzise .

descriptions: Condello and Gallico were opposing sides in the Faida di Palmi.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Palmi : scoppiata nel 1977 tra i Condello e i Gallico e durata più di un ventennio.

descriptions: The Condello faction (Parrello-Condello) was in a feud with the Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello -Condello

descriptions: Gallico and Bruzzise were in a feud that re-emerged in 2010.

Forming Kaos.description: Criminal street gang based in Costa Mesa, California, founded in the early 1990s as a party/tagger crew before evolving into a street gang. Composed primarily of Mexican-American members, it is affiliated with the Sureños and has ties to the Mexican Mafia. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, firearms trafficking, and violent crime. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: Forming Kaos has documented ties to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: FK is affiliated with the Sureños and has documented ties to the Mexican Mafia (La Eme).

descriptions: Forming Kaos is affiliated with the Sureños.
edges.evidence_quote: FK is affiliated with the Sureños

descriptions: Sureños are allied with Forming Kaos.

descriptions: SSNA was formed by defectors from MTA as a rival organization.
edges.evidence_quote: some Shan nationalists in the MTA disagreed with his leadership and formed a rival Shan organisation, the Shan State National Army (SSNA)

descriptions: UWSA was in conflict with Mong Tai Army until 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: Until 1996 the United Wa State Army was involved in a conflict against the Shan Mong Tai Army led by drug kingpin Khun Sa

United Blood Nation.description: The United Blood Nation is a street and prison gang active primarily in the New York metropolitan area, founded on July 16, 1993, at Rikers Island by Leonard McKenzie. It serves as the East Coast faction of the California-based Bloods, engaging in drug trafficking, robbery, and extortion. The gang became dominant in the 1990s but splintered after founder Omar Portee's 2001 RICO conviction. It remains active with an estimated 7,000-15,000 members.

descriptions: Bloods are allied with United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: United Blood Nation

descriptions: UBN is an East Coast affiliate of Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: "Bloods" is a universal term used to refer to West Coast Bloods and United Blood Nation (UBN, also known as the East Coast Bloods).

descriptions: Infobox lists United Blood Nation as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Brotherhood , Bloods , Florencia 13 , Latin Kings , People Nation , Playboys , Santa Monica 13 , Tiny Rascal Gang , United Blood Nation , Venice 13

edges.evidence_quote: They have had an ongoing feud with other area gangs, including the sets affiliated with the United Blood Nation

descriptions: Hidden Valley Kings have had altercations with United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hidden Valley Kings don't have many known enemies, but within the neighborhood members have been known to have altercations with the United Blood Nation.

'Ndrina Giorgi.description: The Giorgi 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in international drug trafficking, with operations in Germany and the Netherlands. The clan has ties with other 'Ndrangheta families and the Salento criminality in Apulia. They have been targeted by multiple police operations in the 2010s and 2020s.

descriptions: Agresta and Giorgi are both targeted in the Platinum-Dia operation.

GAS Gang.description: British street gang based in Brixton, South London, formed in the late 2000s. Known for drug trafficking, murder, theft, and money laundering. Considered one of the most dangerous gangs in South London by 2012, responsible for multiple murders and violent incidents. Membership declined in the early 2010s due to incarceration of leaders.

descriptions: 150 is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: some younger members of GAS Gang now referring to themselves as GAS Rockblock 150 (or Rockblock 150, and later simply 150)

descriptions: GAS Gang had a rivalry with ABM.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was known for its violent conflicts with neighbouring gangs, and had rivalries with ABM (All Bout Money) based in Stockwell

descriptions: GAS Gang had conflict with DSN.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with Croydon -based gang DSN (Don't Say Nuttin).

descriptions: GAS Gang had a rivalry with GMG.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was known for its violent conflicts with neighbouring gangs, and had rivalries with ... GMG based in Peckham

descriptions: Loughborough Bois merged with GAS Gang.

Mob Piru.description: The Mob Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance and a criminal organization, part of the larger Bloods alliance. Based in East Compton, California, it is primarily African American and involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and arms trafficking. Suge Knight, co-founder of Death Row Records, is an affiliate. The set split from Lueders Park Piru at some point.

descriptions: Black P. Stones is especially affiliated with the Piru coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black P. Stones are affiliated with the Bloods alliance and especially with the Piru coalition.

descriptions: Mob Piru is listed as a rival of Cedar Block Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mob Piru , Palmer Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Fruit Town Piru has a rivalry with Mob Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: This Piru set is known for its rivalry with the Mob Piru Bloods during the early 2000s.

descriptions: Mob Piru is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mob Piru , Elm Street Piru , Lueders Park Piru

descriptions: Lueders Park Piru and Mob Piru became enemies after internal conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the two gangs became enemies after the internal conflict resulting in multiple murders during the Death Row Records era.

descriptions: Lueders Park Piru sided with Mob Piru during a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Lueders Park Piru sided with the Mob Piru

descriptions: Mob Piru is part of the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: which is itself part of the larger Bloods alliance

descriptions: Cross Atlantic Piru is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cross Atlantic Piru

descriptions: Elm Street Piru is listed as an ally of Mob Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Elm Street Piru

descriptions: Mob Piru and Fruit Town Piru developed a rivalry resulting in murders.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mob Piru and Fruit Town Piru developed a rivalry by the late 1990s, which resulted in the murders of several Mob Pirus associated with Death Row Records

descriptions: A rivalry and conflict developed between Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru after a murder in 2009.
edges.evidence_quote: a rivalry developed after a Lueders Park Piru member was murdered in April 2009, leading to a series of shootings between 2009 and 2013

descriptions: Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru were previously one gang before splitting.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru were previously one gang, until they split apart

descriptions: Mob Piru is a set within the Piru gang alliance, which originated from Piru Street Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mob Piru ... is a 'set' of the Piru gang alliance

descriptions: Santana Blocc Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Santana Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Mob Piru and South Side Crips are rival gangs in Compton.
edges.evidence_quote: Allegedly, before the murder, a Southside Crip, whom are a rival gang to the Mob Piru gang in Compton

descriptions: Mob Piru Bloods and South Side Compton Crips were in a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: a gang war broke out in Compton between the Mob Piru Bloods, and the South Side Compton Crips

descriptions: South Side Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips

descriptions: South Side Compton Crips attacked a Mob Piru member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: a group of South Side Compton Crips led by Orlando Anderson attacked Trevon Lane, a Mob Piru Blood , at Lakewood Mall

descriptions: Mob Piru is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mob Piru , Fruit Town Piru , Lueders Park Piru , Santana Blocc Compton Crips , Neighbourhood Compton Crips

Westside Locos.description: Predominantly Latino-American street gang based in San Fernando Valley Glendale, with history dating back to the 1950s. They reside mainly in the Riverside Rancho neighborhood and are known for their graffiti tagging. The gang is part of a larger Locos 13 alliance throughout Los Angeles County.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

Ghetto Boys.description: The Ghetto Boys is a street gang based in South London, primarily in New Cross, Lewisham, and Deptford. Formed in the 1970s on the Woodpecker Estate, the gang is mostly of Black British origin and has been involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, and robbery. It had a violent conflict with the Peckham Boys during the 2000s but declined by the mid-late 2000s, splintering into groups like Shower and 814. The gang is still active as of the 2000s-present.

descriptions: 814 is an offshoot group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: an offshoot group from the Ghetto Boys, known as 814

descriptions: Black Mafia superseded the weakened Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Black Mafia (BM) was one of the gangs that superseded the now weakened and fragmented Ghetto Boys

descriptions: Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem

descriptions: Catford Wildcatz is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower)

descriptions: Catford Wildcatz is a splinter group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Ghetto Boys members in Catford split off from the gang to form their own gang called the Catford Wildcatz

descriptions: Cherry Boys is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cherry Boys

descriptions: D-Block is a splinter group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: D-Block (Deptford)

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Peckham Boys

descriptions: After decades of conflict, the two gangs agreed to a ceasefire and alliance in 2007/8.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2007/8, after decades of conflict, the Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys had agreed to a ceasefire and alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups included the Pepys Gang Bangers

edges.evidence_quote: Younger members of the gang formed "Shower"

descriptions: Shower is formed by younger members of Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Younger members of the Ghetto Boys had formed 'Shower'.

descriptions: Ghetto Boys allegedly had links with Shower Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: It is alleged the group had links with the Jamaican gang Shower Posse

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tottenham Mandem

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Woolwich Boys

descriptions: Young Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)

descriptions: Younger Ghetto Boys is a crew within Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ghetto Boys, similar to other gangs in the area, had crews for younger members of the gang: Younger Ghetto Boys (YGB)

descriptions: Younger Younger Ghetto Boys is a crew within Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Younger Younger Ghetto Boys (YYGB)

descriptions: Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys engaged in a shootout, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2004, the Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys had an infamous shootout outside the Urban Music Awards, held in the Barbican Centre, London.

descriptions: Peckham Boys attacked a man mistaken for a Ghetto Boys member, showing ongoing conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 17 September 2006, a man was shot and stabbed to death on the Woodpecker Estate in New Cross by the Peckham Boys, after being mistaken for a member of the Ghetto Boys.

descriptions: Exchange of shots between Ghetto Boys and Peckham Boys members, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2008, during an exchange of shots between a member of the Ghetto Boys and a Peckham Boys member, Polish care worker Magda Pniewska was hit by a stray bullet and died.

Brothers for Life.description: Middle Eastern criminal organisation based in South-Western Sydney, Australia, founded by Bassam Hamzy in 2007. Involved in drug trafficking and violent gang conflicts, including internal disputes and wars with the Alameddine crime network. Active in Sydney and Melbourne.

descriptions: Talal Alameddine brawled with Bassam Hamzy, founder of Brothers for Life.
edges.evidence_quote: Talal Alameddine got into a brawl with fellow Goulburn Correctional Centre inmate Bassam Hamzy, founder of the Brothers for Life organisation.

descriptions: The Alameddines are in a feud with the Hamzy crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Since October 2020, the Alameddines have grown to public notoriety in connection to an extended feud they became involved in with the Hamzy/Hamze crime family

descriptions: Alameddine and Hamze families are rival criminal families in Australia engaged in feuds.
edges.evidence_quote: Often different rival criminal families are interlocked in feuds (e.g. Alameddine VS Hamze), resulting in a fair amount of violence.

descriptions: Alameddine crime network and Brothers for Life are in a feud resulting in shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: As of 2024, the ongoing feud between the Alameddine crime network and the Brothers for Life of the Hamzy family has led to at least 11 shooting deaths.

descriptions: Brothers for Life was in conflict with the Alameddine crime network from 2020 to 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2020 and 2022, the gang was again in the public eye as one side of a new conflict, then against the Alameddine crime network.

descriptions: Tensions between Brothers for Life and Alameddine crime network continued in 2024.
edges.evidence_quote: On 18 December 2024, The Daily Telegraph released an article detailing a bizarre jail call between an accused Melbourne gunman, and an unknown associate of the Alameddine crime network, demonstrating that tensions between the crews were ongoing and had even gone interstate.

descriptions: Brothers for Life was closely allied with the Bandidos around 2008-2009.
edges.evidence_quote: During this time, B4L became closely allied with both MBM, and the Bandidos.

descriptions: Bandidos were previously aligned with MBM, which was absorbed by Brothers for Life, indicating a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos had previously been aligned with Sydney's MBM gang, which had since been absorbed by B4L.

descriptions: Masood Zakaria, a Brothers for Life member, was a former lieutenant in the Comanchero Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: Zakaria also used to be a lieutenant in the Comanchero Motorcycle Club under former sergeant-at-arms Tarek Zahed

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed the remnants of DLASTHR around 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: In turn, B4L took over in the area, absorbing the remnants of MBM, and prolific Assyrian street-gang DLASTHR (The Last Hour), including member Michael Odisho.

descriptions: Brothers for Life's Illawarra faction had animosity towards the Finks Motorcycle Club, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A principle motivation behind the activities of Featherstone's faction appeared to be the gang's animosity towards Troy Forniciari, the self-appointed leader of the Illawarra chapter of the Finks Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Brothers for Life was closely allied with the Muslim Brotherhood Movement around 2008-2009.
edges.evidence_quote: During this time, B4L became closely allied with both MBM, and the Bandidos.

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed the remnants of the Muslim Brotherhood Movement after it was dismantled in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: In turn, B4L took over in the area, absorbing the remnants of MBM, and prolific Assyrian street-gang DLASTHR (The Last Hour), including member Michael Odisho.

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed MBM, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos had previously been aligned with Sydney's MBM gang, which had since been absorbed by B4L.

descriptions: The Hamzy/Hamze crime family is a faction of Brothers for Life.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hamzy/Hamze crime family, the most dominant faction of the Brothers for Life organisation

descriptions: The Hamzy/Hamze crime family is the most dominant faction of Brothers for Life.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hamzy/Hamze crime family, the most dominant faction of the Brothers for Life organisation

descriptions: Federico Faillace was an affiliate of Forastefano and also head of Faillace-Portoraro, indicating a structural link.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 agosto 2009 viene ucciso ... Federico Faillace ... presunto affiliato ai Forastefano, nonché capo dei Faillace-Portoraro

descriptions: Rollin' 40's NHC is an ally of Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rollin 40's and Rollin 90's NHCs

descriptions: Rollin' 40s Crips joined the alliance with Rollin' 60s and Rollin' 90s.
edges.evidence_quote: this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: Anastasio group is a satellite group operating under Mazzarella clan's command.
edges.evidence_quote: The Anastasio group (led by Raffaele Anastasio) ran extortion rackets targeting local businesses in Sant’Anastasia to fund clan operations and support imprisoned members.

edges.source: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
edges.target: Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo / Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais
descriptions: ADCVI acted against CODECO/URDPC as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: ADCVI engaged in provocative actions against rival groups, such as the Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo /Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais (CODECO/URDPC)

edges.target: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
descriptions: ADCVI allied with AFC-M23 (M23) for joint operations.
edges.evidence_quote: ADCVI reinforced its alliance with the AFC-M23 in preparation for planned offensive operations against FARDC in Ituri.

descriptions: The Muslim Brotherhood founded the Freedom and Justice Party as its political wing.
edges.evidence_quote: On 30 April 2011, the Brotherhood launched a new party called the Freedom and Justice Party

descriptions: Soai-kai was originally an affiliate of Sasada-ikka, then became independent in 1955.
edges.evidence_quote: The Soai-kai was formed in 1945 by Toramatsu Takahashi, then a member of a Yokohama -based bakuto group named the Sasada-ikka. Originally named the "Gyosui-kai" ( 魚水会 ) as an affiliate of the Sasada-ikka, the group was renamed the "Takatora-gumi" ( 高寅組 ) and again renamed the Soai-kai in 1955 when the group became independent from the Sasada-ikka.

descriptions: SETCO transported supplies for Los Contras.
edges.evidence_quote: la compañía aérea hondureña SETCO, fue la principal empresa utilizada por La Contra en Honduras para transportar suministros y personal para la FDN

descriptions: Black Cobra and Black Spider are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Ferraiuolo clan is a group under the influence of the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the reports of the DIA about the Camorra, the Mazzarella clan , despite the bloody war against the Rinaldi clan , is still one of the most powerful organizations in Campania , dominating the territory in various neighbourhoods, and having numerous groups under their influence, as the Ferraiuolo clan.

descriptions: The text states that from Masonic lodges other secret organizations like Carboneria formed, but does not assert a direct relationship between Camorra and Carboneria.
edges.evidence_quote: da cui si formarono altre organizzazioni segrete (come la Carboneria ) con particolari riti, regolamenti e linguaggio iniziatico

descriptions: MUB is listed as an ally of the PKK in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Bethnahrin National Council

descriptions: Bethnahrin National Council is listed as an ally of PKK in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bethnahrin National Council

descriptions: The PKK lists the Bethnahrin National Council as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Bethnahrin National Council

descriptions: The infobox lists the Bethnahrin National Council as a non-state ally of the PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Non-state allies: ... Bethnahrin National Council

descriptions: AndAriel is an affiliation of Lazarus Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Lab 110, Bureau 121, Unit 180, AndAriel

descriptions: AndAriel is a unit (subgroup) of Lazarus Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Lazarus is believed to have two units. ... AndAriel
